findings.summary: Assumed missing ./selve in genomics meant selve was unavailable; actual launcher lives in sibling repo ~/Projects/selve/selve.
findings.evidence: Initial friction from missing repo-local launcher; verified by `uv run python3 scripts/selve_helper.py health` after adding helper.
findings.proposed_fix: Keep a repo-local selve bridge/health command and prefer it over skill-path assumptions.

findings.summary: First benchmark_doctor implementation checked receipt output paths with raw Path(...), which misclassifies Modal /data artifacts during local validation.
findings.evidence: Patched scripts/benchmark_doctor.py after realizing /data paths must be localized before existence checks.
findings.proposed_fix: All local validators that inspect Modal artifacts should route through benchmark_contract.localize_artifact_path().

findings.summary: Field-to-caller lint initially failed because discriminated receipt kind overrides lacked caller metadata.
findings.evidence: `uv run pytest tests/test_benchmark_contracts.py tests/test_model_review_status.py -q` failed once with missing callers on TruthBenchmarkReceipt.kind/ConcordanceAuditReceipt.kind/BoundedProbeReceipt.kind, then passed after patch.
findings.proposed_fix: Keep a dedicated contract test for caller metadata and use the governed_field helper even on discriminator overrides.

findings.summary: Historical benchmark outputs predate receipts, so the new doctor immediately reports report-without-receipt drift until lanes are rerun or backfilled.
findings.evidence: `uv run python3 scripts/benchmark_doctor.py` warned on existing hf_public_dna_model_benchmark.json without a receipt.
findings.proposed_fix: Add a one-shot receipt backfill command or rerun benchmark lanes after contract changes.
